title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Brûlée, Carrot, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the straw hat crew's ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They sure brought a bunch of people here...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And it looks like they've seen us..!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: reinforce the back of the fleet!! If there's anywhere to escape after that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Totto Land Grand Grand Grand Grand Grant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It'll be towards their final destiny- lion...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At this point, they're cornered rats!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure to keep a distance to the island! They'll trap us if we get close!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Noooo, we're gonna die! Hurry up, Luuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Link the transponder snails!! I just heard about the situation over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: COME ON OUT ANYTIME, STRAW HAT...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've always had trouble controlling it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I transform into my sulong form... I'm just a rampag- ing monster...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I go into a mindless state where I can't hear anyone, except for one man...

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: That man was big bro Pedro!!...GAOH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no idea why I could only hear him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he always managed to calm me down, even though I was just a mindless beast...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...In other words, there's no one left in this world that can stop my rampage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up, straw hat... tonight is a full moon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use that chance to escape from cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What an idiot! It's useless, pekoms!! You traitor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A war- ready army is waiting on cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you do transform into your sulong form, you'll be suppressed in an instant! And that'll be the end for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will Will

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let big bro Pedro's sacrifice go to waste!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a voice... coming from within the mirror!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Isn't that big sis brilee's voice...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's been caught by the enemy!! It has to be straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's coming!! Snipers, ready your guns!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 63 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
